Text.Page:
They keep me so busy out here that I don't even have time for a decent meal.

You don't exactly look like a chef, but...I know the cloud mushrooms around here are a delicacy.

Since you'll be traipsing through the forest anyway, , can you get some for me?"Not poisonous, I hope."

No poison, just the tasty bounty of the forest.

Check the corners of the woods near Maon's cabin.
Thanks so much, <PCNAME>. I was about to make myself a bark sandwich—that's a chunk of bark in between two layers of...well, bark.
<font color='#660000'>Cloud mushrooms</font> are known across the continent of Arun for their buttery, delicious taste.
